$comment: OneFuzz job configuration for Reactor's managed fuzz harnesses. Tracks SDL work item 62373203 (Applications Security: Apply Fuzzers to Your Code). Two libFuzzer targets share a single host binary (Reactor.Fuzz.exe) and are selected via argv[0]; see Program.cs. SharpFuzz-based managed fuzzing flow per https://aka.ms/onboardasan.

AdoTemplate.AreaPath: OS\Windows Client and Services\WinPD\DFX-Developer Fundamentals and Experiences

Targets.Description: Fuzzes Microsoft.UI.Reactor.Markdown.MarkdownHtml.Render which drives Md4cParser (CommonMark + GFM extensions). Inputs are UTF-8 markdown text.

Fuzzes Microsoft.UI.Reactor.Charting.PathDataParser.ParseTokens — the WinUI-free parse loop that mirrors the production Parse path (number / whitespace / command-dispatch). Inputs are SVG path-data strings.
